title: CONCLAVE
logline: When the Pope dies suddenly, Cardinal Lawrence must oversee the secretive papal conclave to elect a new Pope, but discovers shocking secrets that threaten to tear the Catholic Church apart.
antagonistOrConflict: The corrupting nature of ambition and power within the papal election process, embodied by various candidates' hidden secrets and machinations
tone: Tense, contemplative, with mounting paranoia and moral complexity

actBreaks.description: The first day of conclave ends with Lawrence's speech and the cardinals settling in for the election process.

validation.ruling: Scene #42 introduces the mysterious Cardinal Benitez to the assembled cardinals, fundamentally changing the conclave dynamics and electoral possibilities, representing an irreversible shift that cannot be undone.

actBreaks.description: Lawrence confronts Bellini about the Pope's secret report, marking the climactic revelation before the final ballot.

validation.ruling: Scene #122 shows Lawrence revealing the explosive evidence of Tremblay's simony to Bellini, fundamentally altering the electoral landscape and marking the point where hidden corruption is exposed, forcing the story into its final act.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a tightly contained chamber piece that builds tension through incremental revelations and political maneuvering. The structure follows the ritual progression of the papal conclave itself - from the Pope's death through multiple voting rounds to final election. Each day of conclave brings new secrets to light, creating a mounting pressure cooker effect within the Vatican's walls. The story uses the formal constraints of Catholic ritual as both dramatic framework and metaphor for institutional power struggles.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing mirrors the deliberate, ceremonial nature of the conclave while building underlying tension. Long stretches of procedural scenes (voting sequences around scenes 60-85) are punctuated by explosive revelations (Tremblay's corruption around scene 96, the terrorist attack around scene 111). The rhythm accelerates significantly in the final act as secrets cascade and Lawrence must make crucial moral decisions under extreme pressure.

incitingIncident.description: Lawrence enters the papal bedroom and sees the dead Pope lying on the bed, with three senior cardinals kneeling around it, then joins them in prayer.

validation.ruling: Scene #2 is just setup atmosphere. Scene #9 is the true inciting incident where Lawrence discovers the Pope dead in his bed, shattering the ordinary world and forcing him into action as the Dean who must organize the conclave.

midpoint.description: Lawrence encounters Bellini by the sealed papal suite entrance, where Bellini accuses Lawrence of ambition and warns about Tedesco's savage attacks on the Holy Father.
midpoint.sceneHeading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

validation.ruling: Scene #80 shows passive conversation between Lawrence and Bellini. Scene #104 is the midpoint where Lawrence proactively breaks the papal seals and infiltrates the Pope's quarters to investigate Tremblay, shifting from reactive to proactive behavior with no possibility of return.

climax.description: Lawrence confronts Benitez about the Geneva clinic treatment, and Benitez reveals they were born intersex and underwent surgical procedures to live as a man.
climax.sceneHeading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ROOM OF TEARS - CONTINUOUS

validation.ruling: Scene #144 is just Lawrence walking to a room. Scene #146 is the climax where Lawrence confronts the newly-elected Pope Benitez about the Geneva clinic, leading to Benitez's revelation of being intersex - the ultimate confrontation resolving the mystery and demonstrating Lawrence's character arc completion.

scenes.heading: EXT. APARTMENT BLOCK - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A quiet night exterior view of a modern apartment block in Rome with empty streets.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A sleeping man is awakened by a window pane cracking and then by his phone ringing.
scenes.turningPointNote: The inciting incident - the phone call that summons Lawrence to the Vatican begins the story.

scenes.heading: EXT. TUNNEL NEAR VATICAN - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The man walks quickly through a tunnel near the Vatican, his hair disheveled from sleep.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET NEAR VATICAN - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The man continues rushing through empty streets toward St. Peter's where a blue light pulses.

scenes.heading: I/E. SHOP - STREET NEAR VATICAN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The man passes a shop window displaying plastic Pietàs as he continues toward the Vatican.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LIFT PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In an elevator, the man - revealed as Cardinal Lawrence - smooths his hair, puts on his red zucchetto, and prepares to face men in black suits when the doors open.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence moves through security guards and meets Archbishop Wozniak, who has red eyes from crying, offering him comfort.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence enters the papal suite and is surprised by the crowd of people, realizing he was among the last to be summoned.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence enters the papal bedroom and sees the dead Pope lying on the bed, with three senior cardinals kneeling around it, then joins them in prayer.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence sees the dead Pope for the first time, confirming the pontiff's death and setting the conclave in motion.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence speaks with Cardinal Bellini, who stares at a chess set on the Pope's desk and asks if he can take it as a keepsake.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - SITTING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence questions Wozniak about discovering the Pope's body at 11:30, while Tremblay arrives and reveals he asked Wozniak to delay calling Lawrence so he could ascertain if the Pope was truly dead.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence calls Cardinal Tedesco in Venice to inform him of the Pope's death, receiving only silence before Tedesco briefly acknowledges the news and hangs up.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence orders the papal suite to be sealed as Wozniak covers the Pope's face with a veil and the body is placed in a bag and wheeled away.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - FACADE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Workmen install electronic shutters over the windows of Casa Santa Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BEDROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: A workman tests the electronic shutters with a remote control inside Casa Santa Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - MORNING
scenes.summary: Workmen remove televisions from the bedrooms on dollies.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence watches unhappily as the Sistine Chapel is prepared for conclave - windows sealed with metal panels, carpet laid over the mosaic floor, and electronic jammers tested.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ANTECHAMBER - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence descends stairs behind the chapel altar into a narrow sacristy and then into a small room.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ROOM OF TEARS - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence examines papal cassocks and shoes in the Room of Tears while Bellini joins him, and they discuss Lawrence's fatigue and assumption that the Pope would outlive him.

scenes.heading: I/E. MINIBUS - MORNING
scenes.summary: A group of nuns in blue habits, including the aristocratic Sister Agnes, sit on a minibus outside the Vatican walls.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PARKING - MORNING
scenes.summary: The nuns descend from buses and walk up to Casa Santa Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: The nuns enter the Casa Santa Marta lobby.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes arrives at her office, removes her coat, checks her daily plan, and feeds a canary in a cage.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence waits on the Casa Santa Marta steps with staff as the first group of cardinals arrives with suitcases and security guards.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - LATER
scenes.summary: More cardinals arrive in montage, including Adeyemi leading the Africans, Eastern Ministry archbishops, and Tremblay arriving with Cardinal Guttoso.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Lawrence waits with staff as evening approaches, learning 103 cardinals have arrived while wondering about Tedesco's absence, then greets Bellini who mentions troubling newspaper coverage.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BEDROOMS - EVENING
scenes.summary: Nuns silently prepare the bedrooms by turning down beds and smoothing pillows.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BATHROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: Nuns place toiletry packets in the bathrooms.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SECURITY GATE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Cardinals queue to hand in mobile phones and pass through metal detectors while Sister Agnes supervises the security process.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - STORAGE ROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: A nun places confiscated mobile phones and devices into labeled plastic bags.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - HALLWAY - EVENING
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks quickly with O'Malley and Father Haas, asking impatiently about someone's whereabouts.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - MEETING ROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: Lawrence finds the drunken Wozniak trying to make confession, but refuses to hear it due to lack of time, then learns Wozniak has troubling information about Tremblay that he was promised not to reveal.
scenes.turningPointNote: Wozniak reveals he has damaging information about Tremblay, introducing the first major scandal that will drive the conclave's politics.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence watches Wozniak leave as the building is sealed with shutters closing and the main door being locked.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHENS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nuns work silently in the kitchen preparing the evening meal for 107 cardinals.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes inspects table settings in the dining room with military precision, correcting the placement of silverware.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MAR TA - STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: O'Malley stops Lawrence on the stairs to inform him that another cardinal has unexpectedly arrived, claiming to have been created in pectore.
scenes.turningPointNote: The surprise arrival of a secret cardinal creates a new complication that could affect the entire conclave.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN STORAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence and other officials observe Benitez, a man in plain black attire, sitting in a storage room while they discuss the impossibility of a cardinal in Afghanistan.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence and Bellini meet Benitez, who explains he was head of the Catholic Mission in Afghanistan until his elevation, while Bellini questions the wisdom of his coming to Rome given the dangers.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence encounters Adeyemi in the corridor and they make awkward small talk about being neighbors and Lawrence's upcoming homily.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits at his desk working on his sermon while hearing sounds from the adjacent room through thin walls.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence practices his sermon in Italian before his bathroom mirror, then stops feeling contempt for his own words.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence introduces Benitez to the assembled cardinals at dinner, explaining his secret appointment and dangerous work in Afghanistan, then watches as Benitez faces their scrutinizing stares.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - AULA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence discusses electoral prospects with Bellini's liberal supporters, learning Tedesco may get fifteen votes and Bellini twenty to twenty-five in the first ballot.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - TREMBLAY’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Tremblay in his room about Wozniak's claim that the Pope demanded Tremblay's resignation, which Tremblay denies before suggesting Wozniak may be having a breakdown.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence directly confronts Tremblay about the resignation demand, escalating the conflict while Tremblay deflects by attacking Wozniak's credibility.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence wakes to loud snoring from the next room and cannot return to sleep.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - GYM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks on a treadmill alone in the gym, staring at his reflection as the first day of conclave begins.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence looks down from a balcony at the courtyard filled with cardinals in red robes, showing trepidation before Father Haas calls him.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SIDE ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Father Haas helps Lawrence put on his ceremonial vestments including the red chasuble, white mitre, and golden crozier.

scenes.heading: INT. “ROOM OF CARDINALS” - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits before the congregation of cardinals, bishops, and priests, clutching his sermon while his gaze finds the main papal contenders before Father Haas removes his mitre.

scenes.heading: INT. “ROOM OF CARDINALS” ANTECHAMBER - MORNING
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes and nuns listen from outside as Lawrence delivers his sermon warning against certainty as the great enemy of unity and tolerance.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence's controversial sermon attacking certainty sets the moral and theological framework for the conclave, potentially alienating conservative cardinals.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence is led through the courtyard by Haas and assistants, feeling the eyes of the crowded cardinals upon him.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SIDE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence is disrobed by assistants while O'Malley awkwardly asks about archiving his undelivered homily, and even the usually ebullient O'Malley avoids eye contact with him.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Tedesco confronts Lawrence in the lobby about his sermon on St. Paul as an apostle of doubt, drawing attention from other cardinals.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY LIFT - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence realizes he forgot his key and pats his pockets in the elevator, closing his eyes in frustration.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence emerges from the elevator to retrieve his forgotten key, ruining his exit, and Bellini questions why he stepped forward after claiming he wanted to resign.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PARKING - DAY
scenes.summary: Cardinals board white minibuses in the rain as organ music plays and Lawrence waits, still thinking of Bellini's words.

scenes.heading: I/E. MINIBUS - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits alone on the bus staring out rain-smeared windows at security patrols while the mood among all cardinals is somber.

scenes.heading: EXT. CORTILE DEL MARESCIALLO - DAY
scenes.summary: Security forces linger about smoking and chatting while the bus driver eats a sandwich in the narrow courtyard.

scenes.heading: INT. SCALA REGIA - DAY
scenes.summary: A security guard scrolls through his phone on the marble staircase while cardinals take their oath off-screen.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Cardinals complete their oath-taking in the Sistine Chapel while Lawrence stares up at Michelangelo's The Last Judgment, focusing on the damned being dragged down by demons.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: The doors to the Sistine Chapel are closed.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: The key turns and St. Peter's bell tolls five o'clock as the Conclave officially begins, with Lawrence announcing the first ballot from the microphone.
scenes.turningPointNote: The papal conclave officially begins, launching the central conflict of the story

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: The three Scrutineers count votes from the first ballot, with Lombardi announcing the first vote cast for Cardinal Tedesco.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: Lawrence hurriedly adds up votes as Lombardi reads the final ballots, including one for Cardinal Benitez.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Archbishop Mandorff unlocks the Sistine Chapel doors and they begin to swing open.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley bundles the ballot papers into the stove and ignites them while activating the second stove.

scenes.heading: INT. INSIDE THE STOVE - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: The chemical canister inside the stove activates with a whoosh.

scenes.heading: EXT. SISTINE CHAPEL - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Jet-black smoke streams from the chapel's chimney into the winter sky as a dull roar from the waiting crowd swells and fades.

scenes.heading: INT. EMPTY ROOMS - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Vatican rooms lie still and empty in the late afternoon light while the crowd's roar continues outside and a canary listens in his cage.

scenes.heading: INT. SALA REGIA - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley briefs Lawrence on media inquiries about an unlisted cardinal and provides biographical details about Benitez's work in various conflict zones.

scenes.heading: INT. SCALA REGIA - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley tells Lawrence that Monsignor Morales insisted he knows no reason why Tremblay shouldn't be Pope, but O'Malley admits he didn't entirely believe him.

scenes.heading: I/E. MINIBUS - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Sabbadin criticizes Lawrence's sermon and dismisses his papal chances due to insufficient support and England's thousand-year absence from the papacy.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence observes the cardinals socializing before dinner, with Adeyemi drawing the largest crowd as front runner, while Mendoza tells Lawrence about Benitez's impressive work in Iraq.

scenes.heading: EXT. APOSTOLIC PALACE - PORTONE DI BRONZO - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence and O'Malley walk toward the bronze entrance past saluting Swiss Guards.

scenes.heading: INT. APOSTOLIC PALACE - STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The two men walk in silence up the deserted staircase of the traditional Papal Apartments.

scenes.heading: INT. APOSTOLIC PALACE - SALA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: They cross a large room and continue walking.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SECRETARY’S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence searches through filing cabinet folders in the Papal Secretary's office while O'Malley watches, finding nothing and declaring their search unseemly.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GROUNDS - FOUNTAIN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence spots Benitez by a fountain and sends O'Malley ahead, approaching Benitez who is delighted by the Holy Father's turtles from Angola.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GROUNDS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence asks about Benitez's health and learns Benitez voted for him, prompting Lawrence to explain his intention to resign after the conclave and advise against wasting his vote.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence encounters Bellini by the sealed papal suite entrance, where Bellini accuses Lawrence of ambition and warns about Tedesco's savage attacks on the Holy Father.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bellini's accusation of ambition and revelation about Tedesco's attacks fractures Lawrence's key alliance

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRE NCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence kneels in prayer by his bed but his exhaustion overcomes him and he begins sinking forward into sleep.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence dreams he's kneeling by the late Pope's bed, who stares at him with open eyes and opens his mouth to speak something vital.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence wakes to hear muffled urgent conversation between Adeyemi's baritone voice and a woman's accusatory voice, then hears creaking as he stands to listen.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence peers into the corridor and glimpses a flash of blue uniform disappearing around the corner.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits on his bed with his mind whirring as the second day of conclave begins.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence encounters O'Malley in the courtyard and lies about sleeping well, then decides to walk instead of taking the bus while noticing Bellini watching him.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GARDENS - MORNING
scenes.summary: Adeyemi joins Lawrence for a walk through Vatican Gardens while helicopters drone overhead, praising Lawrence's homily and discussing being tested by doubt.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MORNING
scenes.summary: The second ballot results are announced with Adeyemi receiving thirty-four votes, Tedesco twenty-five, and Bellini eighteen.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MORNING / LATER
scenes.summary: The third ballot results show Adeyemi with fifty-two votes as Lawrence waits with his pen poised.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Two nuns stare out at sinister black smoke rising from the Quirinal Hill while sirens wail in the distance, and one begins praying urgently.

scenes.heading: INT. SALA REGIA - DAY
scenes.summary: O'Malley informs Lawrence about an explosion in Piazza Barberini with injuries but no confirmed fatalities, and Lawrence orders him to keep this from the cardinals.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Cardinals at lunch discuss Adeyemi's likely victory while surreptitiously looking for smoke in the sky, until Cardinal Guttoso quietly approaches Lawrence with urgent news.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM BUFFET - DAY
scenes.summary: Three African cardinals approach Lawrence at the coffee buffet to tell him that a nun serving their table started talking to Adeyemi, dropped her tray, shouted something, causing him to leave.
scenes.turningPointNote: The incident with the nun begins the exposure of Adeyemi's scandal

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence searches the kitchen full of nuns for the one who had the incident, and a nun directs him to Sister Agnes's office.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - OUTSIDE BAC K OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes tries to prevent Lawrence from speaking to the nun who dropped her tray, but Lawrence grips the door handle and insists on seeing her.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence dismisses Sister Agnes and speaks alone with Shanumi, a plump middle-aged Nigerian nun who sits in the corner.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks determinedly to Adeyemi's room and knocks, finding Adeyemi drying his face before following him inside.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - ADEYEMI’S ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Adeyemi about his relationship with the nun while Adeyemi insists he's the victim of a disgraceful plot and denies any relationship with her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Adeyemi's scandal is directly confronted, ending his papal candidacy

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GARDENS - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence meets with Nakitanda and his two colleagues in the Vatican Gardens, and Nakitanda drops his head in dismay during their conversation.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: During the fourth and fifth ballots, Adeyemi walks down the aisle with dignity while the African Cardinals avert their eyes from him completely.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: Cardinal Lombardi announces the fifth ballot results with Tremblay leading at forty votes, Tedesco at thirty-four, and Bellini at thirteen.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tremblay becomes the clear frontrunner, fundamentally shifting the election dynamics

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - EVENING
scenes.summary: O'Malley offers Lawrence information about the morning incident but Lawrence refuses to hear it, then O'Malley reveals Benitez's trip to Geneva was paid by the Pope's account.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence struggles to remove his shoes in his room when Bellini and Sabbadin knock on his door.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK STAIRS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: On the back stairs, Sabbadin and Bellini tell Lawrence that Bellini cannot win and they need to decide whom his supporters should vote for instead.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LIFT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence rides the elevator and sees Tedesco and Adeyemi emerge from a room together, with Adeyemi giving him a hostile look.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LIFT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In the continuing elevator ride, Cardinal Lowenstein jokes about dying before they find a Pope while Lawrence grimly resolves to finish the election.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - UPPER CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Benitez cautiously peers out his door at Lawrence, then disappears back inside to get properly dressed before letting him in.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BENITEZ ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence visits Benitez's candlelit room where Benitez gives him advice about prayer and meditation, suggesting silence over speaking.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence observes the dining room split into two factions with Tedesco and Adeyemi's supporters on one side and Tremblay's on the other.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes tells Lawrence that Sister Shanumi has been sent back to Nigeria on a flight to Lagos.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence approaches Tremblay on the staircase and leads him away for a private conversation.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Tremblay in the courtyard corridor, demanding he withdraw from the election and revealing he knows about a report into Tremblay's activities.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence directly confronts Tremblay with evidence of corruption, escalating the conflict

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence lies awake in his room, then sits up with sudden determination and takes Sister Agnes's pass key from his nightstand drawer.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks down the empty papal corridor, uses Sister Agnes's pass key to unlock the sealed papal suite, and crosses himself before entering.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence searches the papal suite and office, finding only simple personal items and an underlined passage in The Imitation of Christ.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes discovers the broken seals of the papal suite and stops outside the door, listening.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence stands in the darkness by the light switch, holding his breath as he senses someone just outside the door.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE THE PAPAL SUITE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes realizes Lawrence is inside the suite and shares a moment of connection before other nuns pass and she walks away.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence waits for Sister Agnes's footsteps to recede, then switches the light back on.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL BEDROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Lawrence enters the stripped papal bedroom, finds empty cassocks in the wardrobe, and breaks down crying at the sight of the Pope's personal effects.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - UPPER CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Bellini opens his door to find Lawrence standing outside.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BELLINI’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence shows Bellini the report proving Tremblay's simony, and they discuss the Pope's surveillance of all the cardinals while looking at the Pope's chess set.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence reveals decisive evidence against Tremblay that will change the election

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SECURITY GATE - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: Security checks the arriving nuns at dawn as they come to prepare breakfast.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - STORAGE ROOM - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence operates a photocopier to copy the confidential report when Sister Agnes appears behind him and offers to help.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes distributes brown envelopes containing the report to cardinals as they arrive for breakfast.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - MORNING / LATER
scenes.summary: The dining room buzzes with excitement as cardinals read the report, Sabbadin angrily confronts Lawrence, and Tremblay loudly approaches Lawrence.
scenes.turningPointNote: The corruption report becomes public, destroying Tremblay's candidacy

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PRAYER ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence and Bellini kneel in prayer together, with Bellini asking Lawrence's forgiveness and admitting his own heart wasn't pure.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence stares at his blank ballot unable to decide, catches Tedesco watching him knowingly, then writes his own name and walks to cast his vote.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence votes for himself, crossing a moral line he considers sinful

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - DAY
scenes.summary: Two security guards with drawn guns push their way into the Sistine Chapel vestibule.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence stares at Michelangelo's fresco while O'Malley reports that everyone was moved to safety with only minor cuts, then shows Lawrence disturbing news about the outside situation.

scenes.heading: I/E. POLICE CAR - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence rides in a police car through Vatican courtyards with sirens blaring, watching helicopters with missiles overhead.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence strides through the Casa Santa Marta lobby past frightened nuns and curia, telling Mandorff he needs complete privacy.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - AULA - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence addresses the assembled cardinals about the crisis, faces opposition from Tedesco supporters, but wins majority support to receive information about the situation.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SECOND FLOOR - DAY
scenes.summary: A nun walks quickly away from the camera on the second floor.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA/ EXT AULA - DAY
scenes.summary: Cardinals exit down the steps from the aula.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA/ EXT AULA - DAY
scenes.summary: A group of nuns walks quickly down a stairway.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA COURTYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Nuns hurry past cardinals standing in animated conversation groups throughout the courtyard.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PARKING - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits alone in the rain when Archbishop Mandorff approaches, and Lawrence decides they will walk instead of waiting for drivers.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GARDENS - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence leads the cardinals through the Vatican Gardens under umbrellas in the rain, with Bellini taking his arm in solidarity.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence stands at the microphone in the damaged Sistine Chapel with broken windows, beginning what he senses will be the final ballot.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MONTAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: A montage shows the ballot counting process with cardinals rising to applaud around someone at the center of a crowd.
scenes.turningPointNote: A new Pope is elected, resolving the central conflict of the conclave

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: Lawrence prepares the deed of acceptance with Benitez's name while O'Malley stares fixedly at something, and Lawrence tells him to gather the cardinals' notes.

scenes.heading: INT. SALA REGIA - DAY
scenes.summary: O'Malley reveals to Lawrence that Benitez's trip to Switzerland was to a clinic, not a hospital, leaving Lawrence stricken with the implications.
scenes.turningPointNote: A shocking revelation about the newly elected Pope threatens to upend everything

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence strides through the chapel toward the Room of Tears.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence knocks on the door where Father Haas tells him the new Pope won't get robed, then reluctantly lets Lawrence enter.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ROOM OF TEARS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Benitez about the Geneva clinic treatment, and Benitez reveals they were born intersex and underwent surgical procedures to live as a man.
scenes.turningPointNote: The ultimate revelation that fundamentally challenges the Church's understanding and Lawrence's role in the election

scenes.heading: INT. PAULINE CHAPEL - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits alone in the vast Pauline Chapel trying to absorb what he learned when he discovers a small turtle crossing the marble floor.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley burns the ballot papers and activates the chemical canister, watching smoke rise through the broken window into the sky.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GROUNDS - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Lawrence returns the turtle to the fountain and hears the distant roar of a quarter million voices celebrating the white smoke announcing the new Pope.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE’S BEDROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: Lawrence packs his belongings in his room, then opens his window as the metal shutters rise, letting in air and sunlight as he smiles contentedly.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - EVENING
scenes.summary: The shutters in the Casa Santa Marta lobby rise, letting in evening light.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - EVENING
scenes.summary: A canary in a cage in the back office reacts to outside sounds by beginning to chirp quietly.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREETS IN ROME - EVENING
scenes.summary: Deserted Roman streets are shown with a newspaper in the gutter, an abandoned car, and an old crumbling marble statue under a fountain.

scenes.heading: I/E. SHOP - STREET NEAR VATICAN - EVENING
scenes.summary: Cardinal Lawrence appears with a suitcase outside the shop with plastic Pietàs, gazes at the small statues, then walks down the street and disappears around the corner.

scenes.heading: INT. SALE E TABACCHI - EVENING
scenes.summary: In a nearly empty bar, a TV shows Cardinal Brotzkus announcing the new Pope, as a small figure in white cassock steps out to the roar of distant celebrations.
scenes.turningPointNote: The papal election concludes with the announcement of the new Pope, resolving the central conflict of the conclave
